title: Provide feed for livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide feed for livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for feeding

pcs.text: Check and record condition and health status of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and record condition and health status of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and record condition and health status of livestock.

pcs.text: Check and prepare feed and feed supplements according to feeding plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare feed and feed supplements according to feeding plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare feed and feed supplements according to feeding plan.

pcs.text: Check and maintain water supply, quality and quantity to meet livestock requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and maintain water supply, quality and quantity to meet livestock requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and maintain water supply, quality and quantity to meet livestock requirements.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for feeding

elements.title: Feed livestock

pcs.text: Provide feed and feed supplements according to feeding plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide feed and feed supplements according to feeding plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide feed and feed supplements according to feeding plan.

pcs.text: Monitor feeding process to ensure livestock are feeding effectively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor feeding process to ensure livestock are feeding effectively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor feeding process to ensure livestock are feeding effectively.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Minimise feed wastage and spillage according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise feed wastage and spillage according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise feed wastage and spillage according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of or recycle feed waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of or recycle feed waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of or recycle feed waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Record variations to individual animal eating and drinking patterns and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record variations to individual animal eating and drinking patterns and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record variations to individual animal eating and drinking patterns and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Feed livestock

elements.title: Complete the feeding process

pcs.text: Record feeding abnormalities and report to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record feeding abnormalities and report to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record feeding abnormalities and report to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain a safe working area, and store feed and feed supplements according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain a safe working area, and store feed and feed supplements according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain a safe working area, and store feed and feed supplements according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Maintain livestock feed and supplement records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain livestock feed and supplement records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain livestock feed and supplement records.

pcs.text: Follow workplace biosecurity policies where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace biosecurity policies where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace biosecurity policies where required.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes to supervisor.
